description: Merged V7 full game reward rules plus standalone play-to-win manifest overrides. Private in-site currency only.
displayRule: Store as totalCopper; display normalized platinum/gold/silver/copper so copper, silver, and gold are always 0-9 and platinum is uncapped.

score_milestone.label: Score/points milestone converted to OurSpace currency

resource_milestone.label: Coins/stars/gems/resource milestone converted to OurSpace currency

external_fallback_opened.label: Fallback game opened in OurSpace viewer

amongus_match_win.label: Among Us match win / team victory
